overall.description: A static atmospheric shot from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a foggy nighttime cityscape viewed from across a body of water. The scene features neon-lit futuristic skyscrapers with prominent cyan signage, shimmering water reflections, and a moody teal-green color palette characteristic of cyberpunk aesthetics.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk waterfront overlooking neon-lit downtown district

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the distant city skyline from the waterfront, taking in the atmospheric night view

entered.detail: cluster of futuristic high-rise buildings with illuminated windows and neon accents rising through the fog
bright cyan neon signage mounted on the right-side building facade, partially obscured by atmospheric haze
tall central skyscrapers with vertical lighting strips glowing against the dark foggy sky
dark water with shimmering white light reflections creating horizontal streaks across the foreground
thick greenish haze enveloping the upper portions of buildings and diffusing the neon lights

segments.scene_description: A static cinematic view of a cyberpunk city at night, viewed from across a dark body of water. The foreground shows shimmering light reflections on the water surface, while the background features a dense cluster of futuristic skyscrapers partially obscured by atmospheric fog. A prominent cyan neon sign reading 'softsys' glows on the right-side building, contributing to the moody teal-green color palette. The scene remains completely still with no visible movement or activity.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, atmospheric gaze across a dark body of water toward a futuristic cityscape shrouded in nocturnal fog. It begins with a wide cinematic view where shimmering light reflections dance on the water's surface in the foreground. As the eye moves toward the horizon, the scene reveals a dense cluster of skyscrapers partially obscured by a thick, moody haze. The composition is anchored by a prominent cyan neon sign reading softsys on a right-side building, which casts a teal-green glow across the entire still environment.
